programme.title: Under the Fig Trees

programme.title: Complicity
programme.desc: Inspired by a real-life incident. Cheng Liang, a Chinese illegal immigrant in Japan finds new direction when he fakes his identity and lands an apprenticeship with a master soba chef. However, the threat of deportation always lurks around the corner.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: After The Storm
programme.desc: After a celebration in her rural hometown, Karla Petersen is murdered on her way home. Inspector Helen Dorn takes on the case but clashes with local officer Tom Petersen, Karla's brother, who defies warnings to find his sister's killer.

programme.title: Rival
programme.desc: 9-year-old Roman follows his mother Oksana, an illegal nurse in Germany. Oksana falls in love with 62-year-old Gert who tries to befriend Roman. While spending an afternoon alone with Roman, Gert suddenly dies of a heart attack, leaving Roman alone.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Tuesday Club
programme.desc: Karin's world crumbles on her 40th anniversary when she discovers her husband’s infidelity. Seeking solace in a cooking class with renowned chef Henrik, she rediscovers her lifelong passions and learns that it is never too late to follow her dreams.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: Europa
programme.desc: Kamal has fled Iraq to try to enter "Fortress Europe". At the Turkish-Bulgarian border, local mercenaries are ruthlessly hunting down migrants. Alone in the forest, Kamal has three days to escape.

programme.title: I Have Electric Dreams
programme.desc: 16-year-old Eva is experiencing her sexual awakening and is desperate to leave the house she shares with her mother and younger sister and move in with her estranged father, a troubled artist who paints, sculpts, writes poetry and drinks too much.

programme.title: Complicity
programme.desc: Inspired by a real-life incident. Cheng Liang, a Chinese illegal immigrant in Japan finds new direction when he fakes his identity and lands an apprenticeship with a master soba chef. However, the threat of deportation always lurks around the corner.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: Black Snow
programme.desc: Gosha is a trucker in northern Yakutia, who supplies his community with food, alongside low quality vodka which contributes to their alcoholism. When his truck breaks down during one of his trips, he finds himself alone in the wilderness.

programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kale Powder
programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle. 羽衣甘蓝是一种富含23种必需营养素的超级食物，可满足日常膳食需求。我们的有机纯羽衣甘蓝粉无添加剂、防腐剂、抗氧化剂和色素，适合所有年龄段人群，有助于保持健康.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - BRAND'S® Health-For-All Set
programme.desc: Healthy body, healthy life. Step it up with Brands! 生活过得好，身体健康最重要。阖家健康保健品，为你加油打气！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 13
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Travelawak Projek Bapak Bapak S3 - EP 8

programme.desc: Realising that living with her grandparents is a mistake, Emma takes matters into her own hands. The CSS team is shaken by a disturbing post-trauma cleaning case involving a father and son, who live apart, died around the same time. When Emma goes missing, tensions explode between Afnan and Rahim, leading to a painful confrontation that pushes Emma back into her addiction.
